name: Achievements

rows.Name: Victory
rows.Description: Beat the game (any length)

rows.Name: Hard Victory
rows.Description: Beat the game on Hard (any length)

rows.Name: Adaptable Victory
rows.Description: Beat the game at least once per length (2, 3, & 4 Islands secured)

rows.Name: Squads Victory
rows.Description: Beat the game with 4 different Squads (any length)

rows.Name: Complete Victory
rows.Description: Beat the game with all 10 primary Squads (any length)

rows.Name: Emerging Technologies
rows.Description: Unlock a new Mech Squad

rows.Name: Friends in High Places
rows.Description: Spend 50Reputationacross all games

rows.Name: Immovable Objects
rows.Description: Block 100Vekacross all games

rows.Name: Humanity's Savior
rows.Description: Rescue 100,000 civilians across all games

rows.Name: Perfect Strategy
rows.Description: Collect 10 Perfect Island rewards across all games

rows.Name: Perfect Island
rows.Description: Do not fail any objective on a single Corporate Island

rows.Name: The Defenders
rows.Description: Finish a Corporate Island without taking Building Damage

rows.Name: Untouchable
rows.Description: Finish a Corporate Island without taking Mech Damage (Repaired damage is still damage)

rows.Name: Backup Batteries
rows.Description: Earn or buy 10 Grid Power on a single Corporate Island

rows.Name: Good Samaritan
rows.Description: Earn 9 Reputation from missions on a single Corporate Island

rows.Name: Field Promotion
rows.Description: Have aPilotreach maximum level

rows.Name: Best of the Best
rows.Description: Have 3 Pilots at maximum level simultaneously

rows.Name: Come Together
rows.Description: Unlock 6 additional Pilots

rows.Name: I'm getting too old for this...
rows.Description: Have an individual Pilot fight the final battle 3 times across multiple games

rows.Name: Distant Friends
rows.Description: Encounter a familiar face

rows.Name: Sustainable Energy
rows.Description: Finish 3 Corporate Islands without dropping below 4 Grid Power

rows.Name: Engineering Dropout
rows.Description: Finish 3 Corporate Islands without powering a Weapon Modification

rows.Name: Chronophobia
rows.Description: Finish 3 Corporate Islands and destroy every Time Pod discovered

rows.Name: There is No Try
rows.Description: Finish 3 Corporate Islands without failing an objective

rows.Name: Trusted Equipment
rows.Description: Finish 3 Corporate Islands without equipping any new Pilots or weapons

rows.Name: Watery Grave
rows.Description: Drown 3enemiesin water in a single battle with the Rift Walkers squad

rows.Name: Ramming Speed
rows.Description: Kill an enemy 5 or more tiles away with a Dash Punch with the Rift Walkers squad

rows.Name: Island Secure
rows.Description: Complete 1st Corporate Island with the Rift Walkers squad

rows.Name: Overpowered
rows.Description: Overpower your Power Grid twice by earning or buying Power when it is full with the Rusting Hulks squad

rows.Name: Stormy Weather
rows.Description: Deal 12 damage with Electric Smoke in a single battle with the Rusting Hulks squad

rows.Name: Perfect Battle
rows.Description: Take no Mech or Building Damage in a single battle with the Rusting Hulks squad (Repaired damage is still damage)

rows.Name: Get Over Here
rows.Description: Kill an enemy by pulling it into yourself with the Zenith Guard squad

rows.Name: Glittering C-Beam
rows.Description: Hit 4 enemies with a single laser with the Zenith Guard squad

rows.Name: Shield Mastery
rows.Description: Block damage with a Shield 4 times in a single battle with the Zenith Guard squad

rows.Name: Chain Attack
rows.Description: Have the Chain Whip attack chain through 10 tiles with the Blitzkrieg squad

rows.Name: Lightning War
rows.Description: Finish the first 2 Corporate Islands in under 30 minutes with the Blitzkrieg squad

rows.Name: Hold the Line
rows.Description: Block 4 emerging Vek in a single turn with the Blitzkrieg squad

rows.Name: Unbreakable
rows.Description: Have Mech Armor absorb 5 damage in a single battle with the Steel Judoka squad

rows.Name: Unwitting Allies
rows.Description: Have 4 enemies die from enemy fire in a single battle with the Steel Judoka squad

rows.Name: Mass Displacement
rows.Description: Push 3 enemies with a single attack with the Steel Judoka squad

rows.Name: Quantum Entanglement
rows.Description: Teleport a unit 4 tiles away with the Flame Behemoths squad

rows.Name: Scorched Earth
rows.Description: End a battle with 12 tiles on Fire with the Flame Behemoths squad

rows.Name: This is Fine
rows.Description: Have 5 enemies on Fire simultaneously with the Flame Behemoths squad

rows.Name: Cryo Expert
rows.Description: Shoot the Cryo-Launcher 4 times in a single battle with the Frozen Titans squad

rows.Name: Pacifist
rows.Description: Kill less than 3 enemies in a single battle with the Frozen Titans squad

rows.Name: Trick Shot
rows.Description: Kill 3 enemies with a single attack of the Janus Cannon with the Frozen Titans squad

rows.Name: Healing
rows.Description: Heal 10 Mech Health in a single battle with the Hazardous Mechs squad

rows.Name: Immortal
rows.Description: Finish 4 Corporate Islands without a Mech being destroyed at the end of a battle with the Hazardous Mechs squad

rows.Name: Overkill
rows.Description: Deal 8 damage to a unit with a single attack with the Hazardous Mechs squad

rows.Name: Change the Odds
rows.Description: Raise Grid Defense to 30% or more with a Random squad

rows.Name: Loot Boxes!
rows.Description: Open 5 Time Pods in a single game with a Random squad

rows.Name: Lucky Start
rows.Description: Beat the game (any length) without spending any Reputation with a Random squad

rows.Name: Class Specialist
rows.Description: Beat the game with 3 different Mechs from the same class in a Custom squad

rows.Name: Flight Specialist
rows.Description: Beat the game with 3 flying Mechs in a Custom squad

rows.Name: Mech Specialist
rows.Description: Beat the game with 3 of the same Mech in a Custom squad

rows.Name: Hold the Door
rows.Description: Block 30 Emerging Vekenemiesby the end of Island 2

rows.Name: No Survivors
rows.Description: Have 7 units (any team) die in a single turn

rows.Name: Powered Blast
rows.Description: Pierce a Walking Bomb with the AP Cannon to kill an Enemy

rows.Name: Spider Breeding
rows.Description: Spawn 15 Arachnoids in one Island

rows.Name: Working Together
rows.Description: Area Shift 4 units at once

rows.Name: Efficient Explosives
rows.Description: Kill 3 Enemies with 1 shot of the Ricochet Rocket

rows.Name: Stay With Me!
rows.Description: Heal 12 damage over the course of a single Island

rows.Name: Let's Walk
rows.Description: Move Enemies with Control Shot 120 spaces in one game

rows.Name: On the Backburner
rows.Description: Do 4 damage with the Reverse Thrusters

rows.Name: Boosted
rows.Description: Boost 8 Mechs in one mission

rows.Name: Feed the Flame
rows.Description: Light 3 Enemies on fire with a single attack

rows.Name: Maximum Firepower
rows.Description: Deal 8 damage with a single activation of the Quick-Fire Rockets

rows.Name: Unstable Ground
rows.Description: Crack 10 tiles in one mission

rows.Name: Core of the Earth
rows.Description: Drop 10 Enemies into pits on one Island

rows.Name: Miner Inconvenience
rows.Description: Destroy 20 mountains in one game

sections.intro:
Into The Breachcontains a total of70achievements:55from the base game and15added inAdvanced Edition. Each achievement unlocked grants oneCoin, a currency used to unlock newsquads.
Since the release of Advanced Edition, collecting every coin is no longer necessary to unlock every squad, and the last 5 coins cannot be spent.
sections.List of achievements: Achievements may also be unlocked withcheat codes.
sections.Trivia: - Achievement Coins have the Kestrel fromFaster than Light- the first gameSubset Gamesworked on - engraved into them.
